summary.en: Immersive coding bootcamp teaching JavaScript, Node.js, React and cybersecurity to aspiring software developers.
summary.zh: 沉浸式程式設計訓練營，教授 JavaScript、Node.js、React 與資安，培養軟體開發人才。

highlight.en: A pioneer of the immersive code-education wave that YC helped seed in the early 2010s. Founders David Yang and Nimit Maru sold Fullstack Academy to NASDAQ-listed Zovio in 2019 in a deal worth about $33M.
highlight.zh: 是 YC 在 2010 年代初期催生的沉浸式程式教育浪潮的先驅之一。創辦人 David Yang 與 Nimit Maru 於 2019 年將公司以約 3,300 萬美元賣給那斯達克上市的 Zovio。

funding.en: Acquired by Zovio in 2019 for ~$33M ($17.5M cash plus stock)
funding.zh: 2019 年被 Zovio 以約 3,300 萬美元收購（1,750 萬美元現金加股票）

sources.title: NYC coding bootcamp Fullstack Academy acquired by Zovio
Fullstack Academy - Wikipedia

summary.en: Single sign-on and data platform powering classroom technology for the majority of US K-12 schools.
summary.zh: 為全美多數 K-12 學校提供課堂科技支援的單一登入與資料平台。

highlight.en: Clever became foundational US K-12 ed-tech infrastructure, used by roughly two-thirds of American schools. Norwegian learning giant Kahoot! acquired it in 2021 at an enterprise value of up to $500M.
highlight.zh: Clever 成為美國 K-12 教育科技的基礎設施，約三分之二的美國學校使用。挪威學習巨頭 Kahoot! 於 2021 年以最高 5 億美元企業價值收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Kahoot! in 2021 at up to ~$500M enterprise value
funding.zh: 2021 年被 Kahoot! 以最高約 5 億美元企業價值收購

founders: Tyler Bosmeny, Dan Carroll, Rafael Garcia

sources.title: Kahoot acquires Clever, the US-based edtech portal, for up to $500M
Clever (company) - Wikipedia

summary.en: Consumer finance platform and marketplace matching investors with fiduciary financial advisors.
summary.zh: 面向消費者的理財資訊平台與媒合市集，將投資人與受託理財顧問配對。

highlight.en: SmartAsset turned free financial calculators into a high-growth advisor lead-generation business reaching tens of millions monthly. It crossed unicorn status in 2021 with a $110M Series D valuing it over $1B.
highlight.zh: SmartAsset 將免費理財計算工具發展成高速成長的顧問名單生成業務，每月觸及數千萬人。2021 年完成 1.1 億美元 D 輪融資，估值突破 10 億美元，躋身獨角獸。

funding.en: Last valued over $1B; $110M Series D (2021), ~$161M raised total
funding.zh: 最新估值逾 10 億美元；2021 年 D 輪募得 1.1 億美元，累計募資約 1.61 億美元

sources.title: SmartAsset Raises $110 Million in Series D Funding, Bringing its Valuation to Over $1 Billion
SmartAsset rethinks financial advisory, and becomes a unicorn in the process

summary.en: Maker of premium lightweight electric skateboards and last-mile personal electric vehicles.
summary.zh: 高階輕量電動滑板與最後一哩路個人電動載具的製造商。

highlight.en: Boosted was the most recognizable premium brand of the electric-skateboard era. It laid off most of its ~130 staff in March 2020, blaming capital intensity and US-China tariffs, and wound down operations.
highlight.zh: Boosted 是電動滑板時代最具辨識度的高階品牌。2020 年 3 月裁掉約 130 名員工中的大多數，歸咎於高資本投入與美中關稅，隨後結束營運。

funding.en: Ceased operations in 2020 after layoffs; assets later sold
funding.zh: 2020 年裁員後停止營運，資產隨後出售

founders: Sanjay Dastoor, John Ulmen, Matthew Tran

sources.title: Boosted lays off most of its staff, blames financial troubles on Trump tariffs

summary.en: Maker of nutritionally complete meal-replacement drinks and powders pioneering food technology.
summary.zh: 營養完整的代餐飲品與粉末製造商，食品科技領域的先行者。

highlight.en: Soylent became the emblematic Silicon Valley meal-replacement brand, backed by GV and Andreessen Horowitz with over $72M raised. Starco Brands (NASDAQ) acquired it in 2023 in an all-stock deal valued at about $65M.
highlight.zh: Soylent 成為矽谷代餐的象徵性品牌，獲 GV 與 Andreessen Horowitz 投資，累計募資逾 7,200 萬美元。那斯達克上市的 Starco Brands 於 2023 年以約 6,500 萬美元全股票交易收購。

funding.en: Raised >$72M (GV, a16z); acquired by Starco Brands in 2023 (~$65M all-stock)
funding.zh: 募資逾 7,200 萬美元（GV、a16z）；2023 年被 Starco Brands 以約 6,500 萬美元全股票收購

founders: Rob Rhinehart, John Coogan, David Renteln, Matt Cauble

sources.title: Soylent acquired by Starco Brands as nutrition company shifts into its 'natural next stage'
Soylent (meal replacement) - Wikipedia

summary.en: Native video advertising and distribution platform helping brand marketers reach audiences across screens.
summary.zh: 原生影音廣告與內容散布平台，協助品牌行銷人員跨螢幕觸及受眾。

highlight.en: Virool built a programmatic video-distribution platform that served more than 75,000 global campaigns across 100,000+ sites. Founded in 2012, it raised $18.62M from top VCs and angels before being acquired.
highlight.zh: Virool 打造程式化影音散布平台，服務逾 75,000 個全球廣告活動、橫跨 10 萬個以上網站。2012 年創立，被收購前自頂尖創投與天使投資人募得 1,862 萬美元。

funding.zh: 被收購前募資 1,862 萬美元

summary.en: Automated data-movement platform replicating data into, out of and across cloud data warehouses (ELT).
summary.zh: 自動化資料搬移平台，在雲端資料倉儲之間進行資料複製（ELT）。

highlight.en: Fivetran is one of the modern data stack's flagship companies, powering pipelines for brands like Morgan Stanley and JetBlue. It was last valued at $5.6B (2021) and pushed past $325M ARR in 2024 while acquiring Census and dbt Labs.
highlight.zh: Fivetran 是現代資料堆疊的旗艦公司之一，為摩根士丹利、JetBlue 等品牌驅動資料管線。最新估值為 56 億美元（2021 年），2024 年年度經常性收入突破 3.25 億美元，並收購了 Census 與 dbt Labs。

funding.zh: 最新估值約 56 億美元（2021 年）；累計募資逾 7.3 億美元；年度經常性收入逾 3.25 億美元（2024 年）

sources.title: Fivetran revenue, valuation & funding | Sacra
Fivetran Aims to Close Data Movement Loop with Census Acquisition

summary.en: All-in-one HR platform for small businesses covering benefits, payroll, onboarding and talent management.
summary.zh: 為小型企業打造的一站式人資平台，涵蓋福利、薪資、到職與人才管理。

highlight.en: Zenefits was one of YC's fastest-rising stars, hitting a $4.5B valuation in 2015 before a compliance scandal forced CEO Parker Conrad out. It was acquired by TriNet in 2022 and rebranded TriNet Zenefits.
highlight.zh: Zenefits 曾是 YC 竄升最快的明星之一，2015 年估值達 45 億美元，後因合規醜聞迫使執行長 Parker Conrad 下台。2022 年被 TriNet 收購並更名為 TriNet Zenefits。

funding.en: Peaked at $4.5B valuation (2015); raised >$580M; acquired by TriNet in 2022
funding.zh: 估值高峰達 45 億美元（2015 年）；累計募資逾 5.8 億美元；2022 年被 TriNet 收購

sources.title: TriNet Zenefits - Wikipedia
Zenefits acquired by TriNet - Crunchbase Acquisition Profile

summary.en: Digital analytics platform that auto-captures every user interaction with no manual event tracking.
summary.zh: 數位分析平台，自動擷取所有使用者互動，無需手動埋點追蹤事件。

highlight.en: Heap pioneered autocapture analytics, removing the need for manual event instrumentation that defined earlier tools. French experience-analytics leader Contentsquare acquired it in 2023, its largest deal at the time.
highlight.zh: Heap 開創了自動擷取分析，免除早期工具所需的手動事件埋點。法國體驗分析領導者 Contentsquare 於 2023 年收購，是其當時規模最大的交易。

sources.title: Contentsquare Completes Acquisition of Heap
Contentsquare enters definitive agreement to acquire US product analytics leader Heap

summary.en: Print-on-demand platform letting creators design and sell custom made-to-order merchandise.
summary.zh: 隨需印製平台，讓創作者設計並銷售客製化的接單生產商品。

highlight.en: Teespring popularized creator-driven print-on-demand merch, backed by Andreessen Horowitz and Khosla Ventures. It rebranded to Spring in 2021, struggled, and had its assets taken over by Amaze Software.
highlight.zh: Teespring 推廣了創作者主導的隨需印製商品，獲 Andreessen Horowitz 與 Khosla Ventures 投資。2021 年更名為 Spring，後陷入困境，資產由 Amaze Software 接手。

funding.en: VC-backed (a16z, Khosla); rebranded Spring; assets taken over by Amaze
funding.zh: 獲創投支持（a16z、Khosla）；更名為 Spring；資產由 Amaze 接手

sources.title: Teespring - Wikipedia
Spring acquired by Amaze Software - Crunchbase Acquisition Profile

summary.en: Packaging platform offering ready-to-run server applications and dev stacks across any cloud or format.
summary.zh: 應用程式打包平台，提供可在任何雲端或格式上即開即用的伺服器應用與開發堆疊。

highlight.en: Bitnami built an 'app store for server software' with 120+ click-to-deploy packages spanning every major cloud. VMware acquired it in 2019 to accelerate its multi-cloud strategy.
highlight.zh: Bitnami 打造了「伺服器軟體的應用程式商店」，提供 120 多個橫跨各大雲端、一鍵部署的套件。VMware 於 2019 年收購以加速其多雲策略。

sources.title: VMware acquires Bitnami to accelerate its multicloud strategy
Bitnami - Wikipedia

summary.en: Marketplace for professionally managed, verified vacation rentals with hassle-free online booking.
summary.zh: 專業管理、經過驗證的度假租屋市集，提供無煩惱的線上訂房體驗。

highlight.en: VaycayHero (formerly Zaranga) aggregated verified vacation rentals across US and Mexico destinations and had served over 15,000 guests. After suspending service, it was acquired by RedAwning in 2017.
highlight.zh: VaycayHero（前身 Zaranga）整合美國與墨西哥各度假地點經驗證的租屋，曾服務逾 15,000 名旅客。暫停服務後，於 2017 年被 RedAwning 收購。

funding.zh: 2017 年被 RedAwning 收購（條件未公開）

sources.title: VaycayHero sells to RedAwning after service suspension | PhocusWire
